fields.acceptance_criteria: CRUD commands execute real backend paths; deterministic JSON envelopes; no draft status in successful flow

title: [bootstrap] implement lease lifecycle with stale recovery

fields.acceptance_criteria: claim/unclaim/heartbeat paths implemented; stale lease cleanup verified by integration test

title: [bootstrap] add crash-recovery test for atomic write plus reconcile

fields.acceptance_criteria: simulated mid-write crash recovers via scan/reconcile with no silent data loss

title: [bootstrap] wire history, diff, and revert end-to-end

fields.acceptance_criteria: history/diff/revert commands produce expected revisions and preserve forward-only semantics

title: [bootstrap] implement unified query execution on real indexes

fields.acceptance_criteria: mixed metadata + text queries return stable ranked results; unknown fields return deterministic errors

title: [bootstrap] implement deps, blocked-by, and validate-graph commands

fields.acceptance_criteria: dependency traversal and cycle/dangling detection pass scenario tests

title: [bootstrap] add merge queue scheduler with lease conflict overlay

fields.acceptance_criteria: merge queue honors dependency and conflict constraints; queue output is machine-readable

title: [bootstrap] define backup and restore procedure for index plus history

fields.acceptance_criteria: documented and tested restore flow for redb index and git history repo

title: [bootstrap] establish observability and failure diagnostics standard

fields.acceptance_criteria: worker failures emit structured diagnostics with correlation ids and suggested recovery action

title: [bootstrap] run one-week dogfood trial and publish go-no-go report

fields.acceptance_criteria: trial has zero critical data-loss or deadlock incidents; rollout recommendation published
